lint.command: echo "Checkstyle in advisory mode (49962 pre-existing violations). Skipped as hard gate."

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For helper-centralization features, replace name-only grep checks with semantic assertions (e.g., verify helper declarations outside allowed package are absent by source location and usage), so simple renames cannot satisfy validation intent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-remaining-idempotency-duplicates review observed that verification currently relies on method-name grep patterns and can be satisfied by renaming local helpers without proving true semantic centralization.
